[1] Jan Eliáš and Gianluca Cusatis. Homogenization of discrete mesoscale model of concrete for coupled mass transport and mechanics by asymptotic expansion. Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids, 167:105010, 2022. [ bib | DOI ]
